positive: Minimalist symmetrical illustration of a fantastical celestial creature—a bioluminescent winged fox or phoenix—floating amongst stylized constellations and deep-sea coral structures. The style should be highly detailed vector art mixed with modern lithography, featuring strong negative space and clean, thick black outlines (line art focus). Use a limited, impactful color palette of deep indigo, turquoise, glowing neon yellow, and muted gold, maintaining high contrast. Composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel printing, emphasizing strong silhouettes and graphic appeal. Magical realism, vaporwave influence, geometric motifs, clean vector print quality.
